languages.original_text: "Hmm... there is nothing on the pedestals with origins in the Imperium. The selection of xenospawn, however, is remarkable."

languages.text: "Хм... на постаментах нет ничего с истоками в Империуме. Подборка ксеноотродий, впрочем, поразительна".
languages.translation_comment: discovered strange Necron technology (which turns living creatures into hardlight)

languages.text: 「うーん…帝国の起源を持つものはない。しかし、異種族の産物を選ぶのは素晴らしい」
languages.original_text: "Hmm... there is nothing on the pedestals with origins in the Imperium. The selection of xenospawn, however, is remarkable."

traits.locale_text: 「うーん…帝国の起源を持つものはない。しかし、異種族の産物を選ぶのは素晴らしい。」

languages.text: « Hmm... Il n'y a rien sur ces piédestaux qui soit originaire de l'Imperium. Cela dit, cette sélection d'engeances xénos est tout à fait remarquable. »
languages.original_text: "Hmm... there is nothing on the pedestals with origins in the Imperium. The selection of xenospawn, however, is remarkable."

traits.locale_text: « Hmm... Il n'y a rien sur ces piédestaux qui soit originaire de l'Imperium. Cela dit, cette sélection d'engeances xénos est tout à fait remarquable. »

languages.text: "Hmm ... auf den Podesten liegt nichts mit Ursprüngen im Imperium. Die Auswahl an Xensobrut ist allerdings bemerkenswert."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... there is nothing on the pedestals with origins in the Imperium. The selection of xenospawn, however, is remarkable."

traits.locale_text: "Hmm ... auf den Podesten liegt nichts mit Ursprüngen im Imperium. Die Auswahl an Xensobrut ist allerdings bemerkenswert."

languages.text: "Hım... Kaidelerin üzerinde İmparatorluk kökenli hiçbir şey yok. Ancak zeno dölü seçkisi dikkate değer."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... there is nothing on the pedestals with origins in the Imperium. The selection of xenospawn, however, is remarkable."

traits.locale_text: "Hım... Kaidelerin üzerinde İmparatorluk kökenli hiçbir şey yok. Ancak zeno dölü seçkisi dikkate değer."

languages.text: «Hum... No hay nada sobre los pedestales que sea originario del Imperium. La selección de obras xenos, por otra parte, me parece extraordinaria».
languages.original_text: "Hmm... there is nothing on the pedestals with origins in the Imperium. The selection of xenospawn, however, is remarkable."

traits.locale_text: «Hum... No hay nada sobre los pedestales que sea originario del Imperium. La selección de obras xenos, por otra parte, me parece extraordinaria».

languages.text: “嗯……这些基座上没有任何源自帝国的物品。不过，这批异形衍生体的挑选标准倒是颇为独特。”
